text: Rehearse a release before the world has to.
A tiny contract change can create an enormous blast radius.
Branchline maps real Git evidence — not intuition.
Then it rehearses the decision paths deterministically.
Canary the risk. Add compatibility. Compare the alternative.
Bring specialist judgment to one sealed evidence packet.
Agents advise. The accountable human decides.
Make the decision enforceable with a portable policy gate.
Bring the same evidence to every coding harness through MCP.
Map it. Rehearse it. Then decide.
